administration_greet: Enables the announcements in this channel or another channel for the members joining this server. Provide no channel to disable them.
administration_greetmessage:
Sets the announcement message when someone joins the server.
Placeholders:
`%mention%` - will mention the member
`%member% or %user%` - will write the member's username
`%server%` - will write the name of the server
`%members%`- will write the server member count.
`%avatar%` - will write the member's avatar url, use it in the embed's thumbnail or image
Embed is supported, generate one here: https://rias.gg/embed.
If the preview is not right, then it means the json code is too long or copied wrong.
administration_bye: Enables the announcements in this channel or another channel for the members leaving this server. Provide no channel to disable them.
administration_byemessage:
Sets the announcement message when someone leaves the server.
Placeholders:
`%mention%` - will mention the member
`%member% or %user%` - will write the member's username
`%server%` - will write the name of the server
`%members%`- will write the server member count.
`%avatar%` - will write the member's avatar url, use it in the embed's thumbnail or image
Embed is supported, generate one here: https://rias.gg/embed.
If the preview is not right, then it means the json code is too long or copied wrong.
administration_setmodlog: Sets this channel or another channel where messages about warn, mute, unmute, kick, ban, softban, pruneban will be posted. Provide no channel to disable the messages.
category_channels_addtextchanneltocatego: Adds a text channel to a category channel.
category_channels_addvoicechanneltocateg: Adds a voice channel to a category channel.
emojis_addemoji: Creates an emoji in this server using another emoji, image URL, or attachment. The formats accepted are: PNG, JPG/JPEG, WEBP and GIF. The maximum image size for an emoji should be 256 KB but Discord will compress it (up to 1 MB). Also be sure the image to be square.
emojis_deleteemoji: Deletes an emoji from this server.
emojis_renameemoji: Renames an emoji from this server.
emojis_emoji: Shows the image of an emoji.
help_help:
Shows a page info for a command, or shows the general help page if no arguments are given.
Most of the commands are single word but there are command groups (or subcommands of those commands).
help_commands: Shows all commands or shows the commands for a module or submodule.
utility_prefix: Shows my prefix in this server.
